response.justification: Strong systems engineer with staff-level experience and recent AI-infrastructure work at Stripe (MCP, agentic workflows), but falls short of the 8+ year production GenAI requirement. Missing Python proficiency and no demonstrated expertise in vector databases or RAG architectures. Recent role suggests rapid skill acquisition in AI systems, but unclear if depth matches the staff-level GenAI expectations.
strengths: Recent AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework experience at Stripe directly aligned with job's technical focus
Deep staff-level engineering background with proven ability to mentor teams and drive excellence across complex systems (microservices, data integration, CI/CD)
Consistent TypeScript and full-stack expertise across major tech companies (Stripe, Shopify) with AWS cloud infrastructure experience
concerns: Resume shows minimal AI/ML systems work prior to April 2025 Stripe role—lacks the 8+ years of production GenAI experience explicitly required
Python not listed as a skill despite being a primary required language; foundation is JavaScript/TypeScript focused
No evidence of vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM optimization techniques, or enterprise-scale ML pipeline design—key technical requirements

key_factors.factor: Recent MCP and Agentic Workflow Exposure
